claim.claim: Ginny's physical appearance consists of a suit vest and dress pants, but instead of a head, has a twisted-up dish rag that can twist to face different directions and appears to squeeze out liquid as it moves.
claim.speaker: Gamemaster

candidatePages.rationale: The page describes Ginny as wearing a three-piece suit (not just a vest and dress pants), and states the dishrag occupies the center of the suit and forms his face by scrunching up — not that it acts as a separate head that twists to face directions; additionally the page says liquid beads at the edges when he moves, which is consistent but the overall description of the appearance conflicts in key details.
candidatePages.excerpt: Gin Soaked Rag, or Ginny for short, appears as a 6-foot-tall dishrag wearing a three-piece suit. The arms of the suit float in the air and end in gloves with mobility, despite the fact that the dishrag only occupies the center of the suit. His face is formed by the dishrag scrunching up, and when he moves some liquid appears to bead at the edges.

candidatePages.excerpt: Now, a member of Belvedere has a few paths to take. They could join the ranks of the academics, studying natural phenomena.
